steps.t: Tárasánë is in the Pristine Glade. You and Tárasánë appear to be in the Pristine Glade. You should speak to her and learn how this has come to be.
Tárasánë is in the Pristine Glade. Tárasánë stands before the Great Tree of the Pristine Glade. You have witnessed the three visions she bestowed upon…
